mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TYPE , BOARD_NM , PARENT_CD , USE_YN , COMMENT_YN , BOARD_NOTE FROM BOARD_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT CONCAT(MENU_LCD, MENU_SCD) AS PARENT_CD , MENU_NM FROM MENU_MASTER WHERE MENU_SCD = "00"
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM BOARD_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
